features.featureTitle: Save the uploaded wide banner image (A1EB606A-8094-4BB7-93B6-3C6A9B809C15-2.png — navy background with Chicago skyline, plumber mascot shield logo, and 'I GOT A DOM' text) as the hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1334x750.png and render it as the full-width hero section background on the Home page.
